cues.label: Expand a, b, c
cues.headline: Admit while legal
cues.narration: The right pointer admits a, b, c — the window a,b,c has length 3.

cues.label: Duplicate a arrives
cues.headline: The rule is about to break
cues.narration: The next a is already inside; admitting it would create a repeat.

cues.label: Shrink from the left
cues.headline: Release the old a
cues.narration: Remove the leftmost a and advance the left pointer until the new a fits.

cues.label: Why still linear
cues.headline: Each index moves once
cues.narration: Right moves forward once, left moves forward at most once — total travel is 2n.

cues.label: Swap the bookkeeping
cues.headline: Same skeleton, new rule
cues.narration: Change only the validity test — a set here, a distinct-count elsewhere.

cues.label: Record the best
cues.headline: Track the answer
cues.narration: Whenever the window is legal, update the best length seen.
